div.div: Create virtual node (vnode) 8 to allow anycast to groupe [3, 4] (associated contacts are duplicated / referenced). Declare nodes 5, 6 and 7 as external (enode), and create vnode 9 to allow anycast to groupe [5, 6, 7] (associated contacts are reattached to the vnode 9 only)
